summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Versions, Notes, and Migration features for Publish Itt. Backend APIs 100% passing (30/30 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with all CRUD operations working for versions and notes. Manuscript Workspace tabs integration working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled - minor React state management issue
Console warning: ProseMirror expects CSS white-space property to be set - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect hooks have missing dependencies (eslint warnings) - not critical but should be addressed for code quality
Select component controlled/uncontrolled warning should be fixed by initializing state properly
seed_data_creation: Test project, chapter, versions, and notes created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: Versions CRUD (create, view, restore, delete), Notes CRUD (create with 4 types: comment/todo/revision/author_intent, edit, delete), Migration endpoint (/api/migrate/projects-to-manuscripts), Manuscripts collection CRUD. All tabs (Chapters, Versions, Notes) in ManuscriptWorkspace sidebar working correctly. TipTap rich text editor functional.

frontend_ui: Create note with different types (comment, todo, revision, author_intent)

mocked_apis: None - all APIs are real implementations
